meaning: n.一神论者,一神教派信徒adj.一神派的
examples: On Sundays, she goes to Unitarian Universalist churches along the way.
Our guest turned out to be a lovely, thoughtful and smart Unitarian minister.
Newton could not be Master of Trinity because he was a Unitarian and so not in Holy Orders.
My team includes former New York governor Eliot Spitzer and a Unitarian minister, Jennifer Hamlin-Navias.
The Freethinkers say that they are not necessarily atheists, but include agnostics, secular humanists, deists and Unitarian Universalists.
